scripts.build: tsc index.ts types.ts broker.ts portfolio.ts warmup.ts reporting.ts metrics.ts provenance.ts report.ts executionTrace.ts replay.ts --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir .
